# ragnor.dev

> A spec-as-code framework for teams that build with AI. Puts a structured,
> versioned specification layer inside your Git repository — readable by
> both humans and AI agents.

## Repository mode

This repository is the ragnor.dev framework source repository (meta-level).
In this repo, canonical framework files are local under `framework/v1/`.
Product repositories that adopt ragnor.dev use `@specs/` as the canonical
specification layer.

## Canonical local files (this repo)

- `AGENTS.md`
- `framework/v1/00_overview.md`
- `framework/v1/50_version-operations.md`
- `framework/v1/30_module-bootstrap.md`
- `framework/v1/60_todo-management.md`
- `framework/v1/40_authoring-guidelines.md`
- `framework/v1/01_glossary.md`
- `framework/v1/commands/`
- `framework/v1/prompts/`

## Framework

- [Overview](framework/v1/00_overview.md): Core concepts, versioning model, immutability rules
- [Version Operations](framework/v1/50_version-operations.md): All allowed operations and state transitions
- [Module Bootstrap](framework/v1/30_module-bootstrap.md): How to create a new module from scratch
- [Todo Management](framework/v1/60_todo-management.md): todo.md format, ID rules, lifecycle
- [Authoring Guidelines](framework/v1/40_authoring-guidelines.md): What content belongs in each artefact
- [Glossary](framework/v1/01_glossary.md): Framework terminology

## Quick reference

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Rules for AI agents — read this first
- [Full framework (single file)](versions/v1.md): Entire framework v1 concatenated for AI consumption

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/topala-dev/ragnor.dev): Source
